name: Talisman of Pure Good
description: This talisman is a mighty symbol of goodness. A Fiend or an Undead that touches the talisman takes 8d6 Radiant damage and takes the damage again each time it ends its turn holding or carrying the talisman.

touch_damage.trigger: Touches talisman and each turn it ends holding/carrying it

holy_symbol.spell_attack_bonus: +2 to spell attack rolls while wearing or holding

pure_rebuke.target: One creature on ground you can see
pure_rebuke.on_failure: Falls into fissure and is destroyed, leaving no remains
pure_rebuke.on_success: Takes 4d6 Psychic damage, doesn't fall into fissure
pure_rebuke.fissure_closes: After resolution, fissure closes leaving no trace
pure_rebuke.destruction: When last charge expended, talisman disperses into golden light and destroyed
